lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਬਦੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੈ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: niramal sabad niramal hai baanee |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad is Immaculate and Pure; the Bani of the Word is Pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧੮॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate veechaaree sacho sach kamaavaniaa |8|18|19|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam, reflect deeply on the Truth; they practice only Truth. ||8||18||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: niramal baanee har saalaahee jap har niramal mail gavaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: So praise the Immaculate Word of the Lord's Bani; chanting the Immaculate Name of the Lord, all filth is washed away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਭ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: niramal jot sabh maeh samaanee |
lines.english: The Light which is pervading among all is Immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree sukhadaataa man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Giver of peace within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹੀ ਸਬਦੋ ਸੁਣਿ ਤਿਸਾ ਮਿਟਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har niramal gur sabad salaahee sabado sun tisaa mittaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Praise the Immaculate Lord, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad. Listen to the Shabad, and quench your thirst. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: niramal naam vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: When the Immaculate Naam comes to dwell in the mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਚੇ ਕੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਦੁ ਵਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: niramal gun gaavai nit saache ke niramal naad vajaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Immaculate True Lord forever, and the Immaculate Sound-current of the Naad shall vibrate within. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal maaeaa mohu gavaae |
lines.english: the mind and body become Immaculate, and emotional attachment to Maya departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਅਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: niramal giaan dhiaan at niramal niramal baanee man vasaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Immaculate is the spiritual wisdom, and utterly immaculate is the meditation, of those whose minds are filled with the Immaculate Bani of the Word. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਮੁਆ ਤਿਥੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vichahu aap muaa tithai mohu na maaeaa |
lines.english: When selfishness and conceit are eradicated from within, then there is no attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: niramal amrit gur te paaeaa |
lines.english: The Immaculate Ambrosial Nectar is obtained from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo niramal seve su niramal hovai |
lines.english: One who serves the Immaculate Lord becomes immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਵਾਜੈ ਅਨਹਦ ਧੁਨਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: niramal vaajai anahad dhun baanee dar sachai sobhaa paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The Immaculate Bani and the Unstruck Melody of the Sound-current vibrate, and in the True Court, honor is obtained. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੇ ਧੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mail gurasabade dhovai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the filth of egotism is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਤੇ ਸਭ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: niramal te sabh niramal hovai |
lines.english: Through the Immaculate Lord, all become immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੇ ਬਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: niramal naam lage baddabhaagee niramal naam suhaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Blessed and very fortunate are those who are committed to the Immaculate Name; through the Immaculate Name, they are blessed and beautified. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਰੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: niramal manooaa har sabad parovai |
lines.english: Immaculate is the mind which weaves the Word of the Lord's Shabad into itself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਲੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਮੁਖੁ ਊਜਲੁ ਸਚੁ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sach naam mal kade na laagai mukh aoojal sach karaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: No filth ever attaches itself to the True Name; one's face is made radiant by the True One. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਮੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: niramal naam man tan mohai |
lines.english: The Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord, entices the mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਜੋ ਸਬਦੇ ਸੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: so niramal jo sabade sohai |
lines.english: Immaculate is the one who is adorned with the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲਾ ਚਉਕਾ ਮੈਲੈ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mailaa chaukaa mailai thaae |
lines.english: Filthy is that kitchen, and filthy is that dwelling;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mailaa hai doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The mind is polluted by the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਭਿ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਬਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: maile niramal sabh hukam sabaae |
lines.english: The filthy, and the immaculate as well, are all subject to the Hukam of God's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲਾ ਖਾਇ ਫਿਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਵਧਾਏ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੈਲੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: mailaa khaae fir mail vadhaae manamukh mail dukh paavaniaa |7|
lines.english: eating filth, the self-willed manmukhs become even more filthy. Because of their filth, they suffer in pain. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਚੁਕਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧੯॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai man antar guramukh mail chukaavaniaa |8|19|20|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam abides deep within the minds of the Gurmukhs, who are cleansed of all their filth. ||8||19||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: se niramal jo har saache bhaae |
lines.english: They alone are immaculate, who are pleasing to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਨਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: man baanee niramal meree manasaa |
lines.english: Their minds and their speech are immaculate; they are my hope and ideal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਊਜਲ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਖ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਅਤਿ ਊਜਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man aoojal sadaa mukh soheh at aoojal naam dhiaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Their minds are radiant, and their faces are always beautiful; they meditate on the most radiant Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਊਜਲੁ ਊਜਲ ਹੰਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: govind aoojal aoojal hansaa |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is radiant, and radiant are His soul-swans.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree gobind gun gaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਕਹੈ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਗੁਣ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gobid gobid kahai din raatee gobid gun sabad sunaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: So chant Gobind, Gobind, the Lord of the Universe, day and night; sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord Gobind, through the Word of His Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gobid gaaveh sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Sing of the Lord Gobind with intuitive ease,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭੈ ਊਜਲ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhai aoojal haumai mal jaae |
lines.english: in the Fear of the Guru; you shall become radiant, and the filth of egotism shall depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand raheh bhagat kareh din raatee sun gobid gun gaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Remain in bliss forever, and perform devotional worship, day and night. Hear and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord Gobind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਤਾਲੁ ਪੂਰੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਏ ਸਬਦੇ ਨਿਰਤਿ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sachaa taal poore maaeaa mohu chukaae sabade nirat karaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Let your true and perfect tune be the subjugation of your love of Maya, and let yourself dance to the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੂਆ ਨਾਚੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manooaa naachai bhagat drirraae |
lines.english: Channel your dancing mind in devotional worship,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੈ ਮਨੁ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad manai man milaae |
lines.english: and through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, merge your mind with the Supreme Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਜੋਹਿਆ ਜਮਕਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi johiaa jamakaale |
lines.english: but if they are emotionally attached to Maya, then the Messenger of Death shall hunt them down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚਾ ਕੂਕੇ ਤਨਹਿ ਪਛਾੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: aoochaa kooke taneh pachhaarre |
lines.english: People shout out loud and move their bodies,
